/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ecg_dealination.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ecg_dealination.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/ecg_dealination.dir/src/ecg_processing.c.o CMakeFiles/ecg_dealination.dir/src/csv_reader.c.o CMakeFiles/ecg_dealination.dir/src/json_writer.c.o CMakeFiles/ecg_dealination.dir/src/ecg_utils.c.o -o ecg_dealination  -lm -lmatio
